LAW AND MOTION 301, RULING - A R G U E D; JUDGE BUSCH MADE A DISCLOSURE ABOUT HIS WIFE, CATHARINE BARNES, A DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY NOT INVOLVED IN THIS CASE AND THAT HE DOES NOT VIEW HER EMPLOYMENT AS A BASIS FOR RECUSAL. HE ALSO DISCLOSED ABOUT ELIZABETH SALVESON, WHOSE NAME APPEARS ON THE PLEADING IS A FORMER PARTNER IN PRIVATE PRACTICE AND FRIEND. NO OBJECTIONS WERE MADE. PETITIONER LABORERS' INTERNATIONAL UNION OF NORTH AMERICA'S PETITION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION IS DENIED. THE M O U DOES NOT EXPRESSLY MAKE PERFORMANCE EVALUATION SUBJECT TO GRIEVANCE. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL A. KAREN, CSR # 8189 (301/PJB)
